content.rendered:
[vc_row][vc_column width=”1/2″][vc_column_text]

Combined Heat and Power (CHP)

Did you know incorporating Combined Heat and Power (CHP) using a Solar® gas turbine into your building or process can reduce the amount of electricity imported from the grid and decrease your total energy cost?

Find out how much you could save here.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”425″ img_size=”large”][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width=”stretch_row” css=”.vc_custom_1592813415904{padding-top: 35px !important;padding-bottom: 35px !important;background-color: #f2f2f2 !important;}” el_class=”reverse-row”][vc_column width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”447″ img_size=”large”][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/2″][vc_column_text]

Power Generation Module (PGM)

Solar’s modular concept for gas turbine generator sets has been optimized for transportation and the scope has been minimized for civil works with our Power Generation Module (PGM). Good for non-hazardous applications only, our PGM solution results in shorter installation and commissioning times, and reduces overall costs for our customers.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width=”stretch_row” css=”.vc_custom_1592812535116{background-color: #f2f2f2 !important;}”][vc_column width=”1/2″][vc_column_text]

Standardized Specifications

  • Standardization for Power Generation
  • Non-hazardousi
  • Modular
  • Compact Footprint
  • Standard Interfaces & Connections

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/2″][vc_column_text]

Power Generation Module Packages

These PGM packages are supported by the following Solar Turbines products:

MODULE POWERED BY RATING (KWE)
PGM40 Centaur 40 3515
PGM50 Centaur 50 4600
PGM60 Taurus 60 5670
PGM65 Taurus 65 6500
PGM70 Taurus 70 8180
PGM130 Titan 130 16530

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]

Power Generation Industry Applications

[/vc_column_text]

[vc_column_text]

Institutional

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]

Commercial

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]

Electric Power

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]

Marine Power

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]

Ceramics

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]

Pulp and Paper

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]

Food and Beverage

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]

Steel Product Gases

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]

Refinery Gases

[/vc_column_text]

[/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width=”stretch_row” css=”.vc_custom_1592880001271{background-color: #374fa1 !important;}”][vc_column][vc_column_text]

Please feel free to contact us if you need any further information.

    [/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row]
